title: Chapter 50
content:

The god eventually leaves, Rafilia collapses unconscious, and the Chapter ends with Masaharu becoming aroused by the situation and considering sexually stimulating Rafilia further (sucking her breasts) to enter "sage mode" so he can think of a solution for Kemolori.
